Our Story

Crafted with Passion

Kallol Cafe was born from a simple belief — that great food and exceptional coffee have the power to bring people together. Nestled in Kharghar, we've crafted a space where flavours travel the world and every visit feels like coming home.

From meticulously crafted coffees and artisanal hot chocolates to indulgent Asian-fusion bowls, Italian pastas, and handcrafted pizzas — every dish is a celebration of taste.

— Kallol Cafe

Amazing the best taste and the staff.. loved it

Crazy food, crazy vibe — love the people! Plus their dog Luca — OMG cutie!

★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Riddhima Agarwal
3 days ago
"

Their tiramisu is on point — the layers, the texture, the flavor, everything was just perfect. A total must-try!

★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Ayushi Srivastava
5 months ago · Dinner · ₹200–400
"

Budget friendly with great ambiance and excellent coffee. The hot chocolate and blueberry milkshake are must-trys. Games and art activities too!

★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Arena Job
Local Guide · 81 reviews · 11 months ago
"

A cozy hangout with spicy chicken momos and a frothy frappe. Perfect corners for books and board games — a hidden gem where laughter flows.

★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Deeksha Bhargav
Local Guide · 9 months ago · ₹400–600
"

Had my birthday party here and couldn't have picked a better spot! The food was insane — every cuisine they do is top-notch. Always amazing.

★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Raina Himatsingka
8 months ago · Birthday Celebration
